title: Finance MSc: Programme Overview
text: Finance MSc. Join an MSc Finance programme focused on investment analysis, portfolio management, and financial decision-making. Apply now.
summary: Finance MSc. Join an MSc Finance programme focused on investment analysis, portfolio management, and financial decision-making.

title: Finance MSc: Programme Overview
text: Develop skills sought by employers in rapidly changing and complex financial environments, and advance your career in industry, government or research. On our Master of Finance in India, we will teach you advanced stock market analysis, corporate finance, and portfolio management. You will also study behavioural finance and explore the behavioural biases that can affect financial decision making in uncertain environments. The MSc is intended for those who aim to work in core finance jobs in the banking and financial industry. The programme follows the market and professional bodies closely and is mapped to skills that employers demand. It builds the ability to use and critically evaluate models and formal processes within finance and financial management.
summary: Finance MSc - Programme Overview: Develop skills sought by employers in rapidly changing and complex financial environments, and advance your career in industry, government or research. On our Master of Finance in India, we will teach you advanced stock market analysis, corporate ...

title: Finance MSc: What You Will Study
text: This is a full-time 1 year degree programme. The first 9 months of the programme comprises taught study, divided into 2 semesters. In semester 3 (the final 3 months) you’ll complete an individual research project for your dissertation. You will cover topics including: complex financial products assessing and managing financial risk management decisions and value creation econometric modelling forecasting leading econometric and statistical software Programme structure Core finance modules like quantitative finance, asset pricing and portfolio management equip students with solid fundamentals and principles that govern investment decisions and the valuation of financial assets. A choice of optional modules in semester 2 will allow you to specialise your education in areas such as computational finance derivative securities analysis fixed income securities analysis The Programme Description Document contains an overview of the programme, its aims, information on programme modules and shows how we assess student progress as they learn with us. As a research-led University, we undertake a continuous review of our programmes to ensure quality enhancement and to manage our resources. As a result, this programme may be revised during a student’s period of registration; however, any revision will be balanced against the requirement that the student should receive the educational service expected. Please read our Disclaimer to see why, when, and how changes may be made to a student’s programme.
summary: Finance MSc - What You Will Study: This is a full-time 1 year degree programme. The first 9 months of the programme comprises taught study, divided into 2 semesters.

title: Finance MSc: Key Information
text: We are mandated by the University Grants Commission (UGC) to deliver the equivalent programme and quality as we offer in the UK. To match the programme lengths of internationally respected UK awarded degrees, the MSc Finance degree has a duration of one year. View University of Southampton Delhi term dates . Dates mentioned are subject to change. Our programmes are taught in English, and content is equivalent to the MSc Finance degree delivered at University of Southampton in the UK.
summary: Finance MSc - Key Information: We are mandated by the University Grants Commission (UGC) to deliver the equivalent programme and quality as we offer in the UK. To match the programme lengths of internationally respected UK awarded degrees, the MSc Finance degree has a duration ...

title: Finance MSc: Your Future Career
text: We are a top 20 UK university for employability ( QS Graduate Employability Rankings 2022 ) and offer extensive support for today’s competitive and rapidly changing financial landscape. You’ll have actual industry experience through: trade simulation workshops access to industry software using live company data weekly research update seminars Career opportunities You build expertise for a career in industry, government or research in sectors including: banking finance and financial services accountancy business consultancy public sector Careers directly related to this course: financial analyst business analyst accountant company secretary external auditor stockbroker risk manager investment analyst management consultant Careers services at University of Southampton Delhi Our proprietary Southampton skills model is integrated into our curriculum. When you join us, you’ll be able to use our skills model to track, plan, and benefit your career development and progress. As well as support from the Careers and Employability team in Delhi, you’ll have access to our market-leading employability development offering. This includes: online resources regular workshops personalised career guidance and support through our MyCareer platform and e-mentoring With links to multinational and industrial organisations, we enable you to engage with employers and explore potential career paths. We also host regular alumni events in-person across major cities in India, allowing you to grow your own networks. Our support is ongoing, and once you graduate, you’ll be part of a global community of over 220,000 alumni that spans over 180 countries
summary: Finance MSc - Your Future Career: We are a top 20 UK university for employability ( QS Graduate Employability Rankings 2022 ) and offer extensive support for today’s competitive and rapidly changing financial landscape. You’ll have actual industry experience through: trade simulat...

title: Finance MSc: Eligibility Criteria
text: In order to be eligible for the programme, you require an upper second-class degree, termed a 2:1 degree, or international equivalent in a relevant subject that includes quantitative study such as: finance sciences maths engineering computer science economics quantitative business or management We will consider the following professional ACCA/ACA/CIMA/CA qualifications on a case-by-case basis. Work experience in accounting is not a requirement but can compensate for unrelated degree subject/grades. English language requirement We accept several ways of meeting our English Language requirement. These include: IELTS Test, with scores of 6.5 overall (6.0 in reading, writing, speaking, and listening) other tests listed on our website an approved academic qualification having the required grade If you’ve successfully completed a degree, taught and assessed in English, up to 2 years before the date of first enrolment at the University of Southampton, we may be able to accept this as evidence of your English language ability. Refer to our English Language proficiency guide for more information about English language requirements. Our academic admissions criteria Typical academic admissions criteria represent the usual level of academic attainment an applicant is expected to achieve prior to being admitted to that programme. These criteria are not intended to provide a guarantee that all applicants who satisfy the criteria may be offered a place, nor that all applicants to be made an offer will receive an identical offer to one another.
summary: Finance MSc - Eligibility Criteria: In order to be eligible for the programme, you require an upper second-class degree, termed a 2:1 degree, or international equivalent in a relevant subject that includes quantitative study such as: finance sciences maths engineering computer scien...

title: Finance MSc: Fees and Costs
text: The fees for the year starting in August 2026 for Indian students are: 23,10,000 INR The tuition fee is paid in 4 instalments. Your first payment will be a deposit of 10% of the programme fee. To confirm your offer, you must pay your deposit as specified in your Offer. For students starting in August 2026, the deposit is: 2,31,000 INR for India students The balance of the yearly tuition fee is paid in 3 instalments. 5,54,400 INR by Monday 07 September 2026 7,62,300 INR by Monday 25 January 2027 7,62,300 INR by Monday 19 April 2027 Fees for international students The fees for the year starting in August 2026 for international students are: 25,41,000 INR The tuition fee is paid in 4 instalments. Your first payment will be a deposit of 10% of the programme fee. To confirm your offer, you must pay your deposit as specified in your Offer. For students starting in August 2026, the deposit is: 2,54,100 INR for international students If you are an international student, you’ll have to make 3 separate payments of: 6,09,840 INR by Monday 07 September 2026 8,38,530 INR by Monday 25 January 2027 8,38,530 INR by Monday 19 April 2027 We may adjust the fees in the future to account for inflation and changes in other costs. Exact payment dates for future years will vary according to the academic calendar. Scholarships We offer competitive scholarships to talented students.
summary: Finance MSc - Fees and Costs: The fees for the year starting in August 2026 for Indian students are: 23,10,000 INR The tuition fee is paid in 4 instalments. Your first payment will be a deposit of 10% of the programme fee.

title: Finance MSc: FAQ
text: Q: Can I get an offer with predicted scores? A: We encourage students to apply as soon as possible so that they can receive a Conditional Offer based on predicted scores for their chosen programme. We can accept an application from a student using their predicted grades if we receive their final grades once they are available.
summary: Finance MSc - FAQ: Q: Can I get an offer with predicted scores? A: We encourage students to apply as soon as possible so that they can receive a Conditional Offer based on predicted scores for their chosen programme.
